_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Promote knowledge sharing between information owners/users through an organization’s operational processes and systems.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to navigate the tension between data sharing for organizational value creation and data protection requirements, finding practical approaches that satisfy both objectives.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.481), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.411). Shared vocabulary: [sharing]. DCWF-only terms [information, knowledge, operational, organization, owners, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, approaches, creation, data, finding, navigate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.878, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Promote knowledge sharing between information owners/users through an organizati" and "Ability to navigate the tension between data sharing for organizational value cr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.522 > STS 0.411 (gap +0.111). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [sharing] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [sharing]. DCWF-only: [information, knowledge, operational, organization, owners, processes]. WIDAI-only: [ability, approaches, creation, data, finding, navigate].
